So I've worked for Grant Cardo for 13 months and it works for him as his digital marketing specialist. For the first three months that I was there, I was his email marketing manager and I was there on a 10th position. Now the way that I got to become a digital marketing specialist and do every ad on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram, the way that I got to go on a whiteboard and draw out how our landing pages were going to be created, the way that I got to type up all the scripts for the videos that Grant would do on different landing pages and funnels that we would sell. The way that I trained is 25 salespeople every day and the way that I became a master of marketing and was able to open up an agency where I duplicated myself into 19 other individuals and successfully built a 500k plus business at age 22 and under 12 months and I'm projected to do more than 70 figures in year number two of that same business in under two years. It's all because of my conviction and my beliefs that I have on everything that I'm doing. The reason that I can get in front of you right now and talk about anything that relates to running a digital agency is because I have a firm core belief that everything that I'm telling you right now is ethically my responsibility to show you because after you identify that you can help people in life, you have to understand and ensure ethical duty otherwise you are morally incorrect. You don't help individuals after you identify that you can. As a business owner, if you have solutions or a series of solutions in the marketplace that you can implement and you identify problems in business owners' marketplaces, why would you not help them out? You are immoral and incorrect if you don't help those people. Grant taught me that it's an ethical responsibility and it's our individual jobs and responsibilities to get success for ourselves, to live in abundance. Otherwise, we live in an introverted, inward state where unfortunately we lose our abilities to continue to deliver and fill others' cups because our own cup is not filled and overflowing. You have to understand that abundant success and just living in a state of over the top type of lifestyles is all the fact that you have to pour into other people by pouring into yourself first. One of the greatest ways to do that is understanding what conviction means, ladies and gentlemen. So here in phase number four in the sales and prospecting phase, this video course is called Conviction and in this specific video, we are going to cover the number one way that you can sell anybody on anything and that's conviction. If you are sold on the fact that the sky is green, you might be able to sell somebody on the fact that they're color blind and they can't see the real color of the sky. Think of that. If you're convicted enough, meaning you're looking at somebody so close in the eyes and you're talking with such confidence and such bold statements and such power and more importantly, some kind of facts behind you, whether real or not if you are in a position where you're confident or articulating that stuff to an individual, they become sold, they become persuaded and they go on the other side of the tracks. Now for every single thing that I'm about to show you, I'm going to give you the actual golden path to the ultimate amount of money for however much you've decided to make for yourself based on how many people you're going to sell and based on the price you're going to sell before. I'm going to give you every single thing that you need to know as a digital agent, a young person within this sales and prospecting phase in order for you to be successful and potentially a lot more successful than me once again depending on your own limits that you place on yourself. But your ability to convict yourself on your own value and your ability to deliver on all of these services is going to dictate your success with anything that I tell you throughout this entire program. There's one video that I cannot stress enough and you need to re-watch if you don't understand that this one right here because this is going to once again dictate your abilities to do everything with anything in this program. You have to go up to these business owners that you're unconfident and shaking to deliver for and deliver a more proof presentation where you're confident and unshaking in your delivery. You have to be very articulate, you have to know the facts, you have to know the objection handlers that they're going to throw at you and if you don't know the objections that they give you, you have to have a confident way to overcome those things and make it look like you know what you're talking about. At all times during all circumstances, you have to look like you know what you're talking about. You have to be the expert. You have to play the role. You have to be the role, ladies and gentlemen. You cannot be like today's goal when you choose to start something or be something. If you want to be a digital agency owner, you cannot slack on this one golden rule. If I'm going to teach you how to sell, you have to teach yourself how to sell yourself on these things. All it is is a mechanism inside of your own mind that allows you to sell yourself and open your belief system to self manipulate your own ability to be oversold on something that you're doing. You could ask me at any time, anything that I'm doing, literally any time, any place anywhere, if I'm eating a cheat meal, I'm going to tell you, look you dead ass in the eyes, why I'm eating that cheat meal and why it's so good. I'm going to justify, I'm not going to be shaken. I'm not going to feel guilty because I'm firm in my actions. Although that may sound egotistical in some instances, it's not because you still have the ability to hear everything that's going on and if somebody does correct you and you find yourself in a predicament where you've said something in a very firm way that is incorrect or untrue, simply be a man, be in tacharis and show that you are actually somebody who is open to changing your mind about something if you are proven wrong. Have conviction in what you say. Don't be afraid to be proven wrong, like some people are, that kind of inhibits their ability to be convicted. You have to be able to self identify any postulates or anything that's holding you back from being in the state. It's a very simple lesson ladies and gentlemen, I shouldn't have to go on about this much, but most people in life don't walk around convicted on the things that they do. You can learn more about this from Grant Cardone because this is one of his key lessons as well when it comes to being oversold on something in order to oversell to other people, but I can't stress it enough ladies and gentlemen. You're about to learn every single thing that you need to know about how to sell inside of a digital agency and without this, you're not going to do anything. Be convicted.
